channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Pregnancy & Reproductive Health
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Pregnancy & Reproductive Health

item.title: STING activation promotes intestinal mucin secretion in IBD.
item.description: Biochimica et biophysica acta. Molecular basis of disease - Goblet cells produce mucus protecting the intestinal epithelium. Depleted goblet cells and a disrupted mucus layer are observed in inflammatory bowel diseases (IBD). Remarkably, both deficiency and...

item.title: Characterizing the effects of genetic liability to autoimmune conditions on pregnancy outcomes using Mendelian randomization.
item.description: BMC medicine - Autoimmune conditions are common in women of reproductive age. They are associated with an increased risk of adverse pregnancy outcomes; whether this is causal is unclear. Our aim was to explore th...
